Off Calendar Nov-13-2003 Text Ruling

Minor'S Compromise In Scd
Off Calendar Nov-13-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Gena Eales.
Appearances:
Peter Balogh, Esq. for Petitioner: Sharon Harden present as guardian ad litem for Michael Clinton Vogan, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
Compromise: $100,00.00
Reimbursement for medical and other expenses of $11,891.41
Other authorized payments to Sharon Harden in the amount of $1,120.42
Attorney's fees: $34,795.26
Total allowance for fees and expenses of $47,807.09
A net balance of $52192.91 to be deposited into a blocked account with Union Bank, 105 West Hanford-Armona Road, Lemoore, CA. 93245-2942, until minor's reaches the age of 18.
Order signed in court.
